# Jady Pamella – Head of AI Engineering
# https://jadypamella.com
# llms.txt – AI-readable profile summary

## Who is Jady Pamella?

Jady Pamella is a Head of AI Engineering based in Stockholm, Sweden, with 12 years of experience in AI/ML, DevSecOps, cloud architecture, and cybersecurity. She has been coding since age 12 and has shipped production systems at scale across fintech, government, and climate tech.

She is:
- Founder and CEO of SoiQet (soiqet.com) – an LLM-powered social media platform with RAG-based AI for content managers
- Co-founder and Chief Innovation Officer of Tree++ (treepp.org) – a climate-tech matchmaking platform for tree planting with 1,000+ trees across 10 countries
- MSc Researcher at Deep Forestry (Stockholm University thesis) – hybrid geometric-neural pipeline for real-time forest drone navigation using LiDAR
- Published researcher in Elsevier's Computers & Security (IF: 5.6)
- Swedish Institute Scholar for Global Professionals (SISGP)

## Expertise

AI & ML: LLM, RAG, LLM Fine-Tuning, Prompt Engineering, MLOps, Computer Vision, NLP, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-Learn, Deep Learning, Generative AI
Engineering: System Design, Platform Engineering, DevSecOps, CI/CD, Kubernetes, Docker, GCP, AWS, Azure
Leadership: Head of Engineering, Engineering Manager, OKR Planning, P&L Management ($1M+), Team Leadership (10+), Technical Hiring
Domains: Cybersecurity, GDPR, IoT, Fintech, Climate Tech, Public Sector

## Contact

Email: hello@jadypamella.com
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jadypamella
GitHub: https://github.com/jadypamella
ORCID: https://orcid.org/0009-0006-4280-3364
Location: Stockholm, Sweden
Open to: Senior Engineering Leadership roles in Stockholm (Head of AI Engineering, Engineering Manager, Principal Engineer)

## Publications

- "Enhancing Cybersecurity in the Judiciary: Integrating Additional Controls into the CIS Framework" – Elsevier Computers & Security, 2025. DOI: 10.1016/j.cose.2025.104584
- "Cybersecurity Protection in the Brazilian Judiciary" – NAVUS Journal, 2024. DOI: 10.22279/navus.v14.2032

- 1st Place – EpiMinds Google AI Hackathon (2026)
- 1st Place – Kong AI Assisted-Coding Hackathon (2025)
- 1st Place – Kolomolo AI-Assisted Coding Hackathon (2025)
- Impact Cup – Drivhuset Stockholm (2025)
- Swedish Institute Scholarship for Global Professionals – SISGP (2024)
- WorldSkills National Phase – Web Design (2012)

## Education

- MSc Computer and Systems Sciences (AI & IoT) – Stockholm University (in progress)
- MEng Cybersecurity – University of Brasília (in progress)
- Executive Program: Designing & Building AI Products – MIT (2022)
- MBA in Innovation, Technology & Entrepreneurship – Descomplica
- MBA in Project Management – FGV
- BSc Information Systems – UPIS
